description: Polyglot stack (C#/.NET Core + Python) creates siloed development with no backup resources.
mitigation_strategy: Mandate API contract testing (contract-first development) to decouple service dependencies.
contingency_plan: Hire contract Polyglot developer or consolidate AI logic into .NET via Semantic Kernel if Python becomes unmanageable.
monitoring_trigger: Sprint velocity variance > 15% between AI and Finance streams

description: DevOps Engineer is sole resource for complex EKS/IAM setup; illness or departure stops all infrastructure work.
mitigation_strategy: Require extensive documentation and 'Infra-as-Code' pairing sessions with Backend Lead.
contingency_plan: Engage AWS managed services partner for emergency support.
monitoring_trigger: DevOps task completion slipping by > 2 days
